overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a stormy night landscape. The character travels from open grasslands past a stone wall, encounters an NPC with a torch, and continues along a cliff edge with twisted pine trees overlooking a dark expanse.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy open grassland with distant mountain range

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds overhead

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady pace through open grassland toward distant mountains

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains visible against stormy sky
dark roiling storm clouds covering the sky with occasional lightning
open grassy field with scattered wildflowers and tall grass
low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark stormy night with the character riding through open grasslands. Lightning periodically illuminates the distant mountain range while a stone wall runs along the left side of the path. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with heavy rain visible.

events.description: passing an NPC holding a torch on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: riding past a pedestrian carrying a torch, continuing along the stone wall

notable_agents.action: walking along the path holding a lit torch, wearing simple clothing

segments.scene_description: The rider continues through the grassland alongside the stone wall and encounters an NPC walking in the opposite direction carrying a torch. The torch provides a small point of warm light in the dark stormy environment before the rider passes and continues onward.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path approaching cliff edge with twisted trees

events.description: reaching the cliff edge with distinctive twisted pine trees

agents.ego_description: riding uphill toward the cliff edge, navigating around rocks and vegetation

entered.detail: distinctive gnarled pine tree with bent trunk silhouetted against sky
steep drop-off becoming visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain begins to rise as the rider approaches a cliff edge. The stone wall falls behind and distinctive twisted pine trees come into view against the stormy sky. The path becomes rockier and more rugged as it approaches the overlook.

events.description: beginning to ride along the cliff edge with view of water below

agents.ego_description: riding carefully along the narrow cliff edge path overlooking the water

entered.detail: dark expanse of water visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the narrow cliff edge trail with the ocean visible far below on the right. Twisted pine trees line the left side of the path while the storm continues to rage overhead with rain and occasional lightning. The rider maintains a steady pace along the dangerous precipice.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a stormy night landscape that shifts from open grasslands to a precarious cliffside overlook. It begins with the rider traversing rain-swept fields beside a stone wall, where periodic flashes of lightning illuminate a distant mountain range. As the rider continues along the wall, the darkness is briefly broken by the warm glow of a torch carried by an NPC passing in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the terrain rises and the stone wall recedes, giving way to a rugged, rocky path lined with distinctive twisted pine trees. Finally, the camera follows the rider along a narrow precipice where the storm continues to rage over a dark ocean visible far below.
